remaining_params.SpellDescription: Return CARDNAME from your graveyard to the battlefield attached to target creature you control. CARDNAME perpetually gains "Enchanted creature gets -1/-1." Activate only as a sorcery.

params.Description: Enchanted creature gets +3/+2, has haste, and attacks each combat if able.
